SELECT HD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , HD.SOHDKEY /*S/O번호*/ , '00' AS WKSTATUS /*작업(주문) 상태*/
, HD.CONTROL_PROCESS_YN /*주문통제처리여부*/ , HD.OR_HDDATE /*배송예정일자*/ , HD.OR_DATE , HD.ACKEY /*공급처코드*/ , HD.STORE_KEY /*판매처코드*/ , HD.DELIVERY_KEY , ORTP.IBYN , ORTP.OBYN , ORTP.WMSYN , ORTP.TMSYN , ORTP.IBHDTYPE , ORTP.OBHDTYPE , HD.EXTERNORDERKEY , HD.LOGGRPCD /*상/저온 구분*/ , HD.CTKEY /*작업물류센터*/ , HD.OR_TYPE_CD /*주문오더유형*/ , HD.ICGRKEY /*물품그룹코드*/ , HD.TO_CTKEY /*물품 이동 센터*/ , HD.REF_DELIVERY_NO , HD.SALESPERSON_ID , HD.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , HD.AMOUNTDISPLAYYN , HD.COMMENTS , HD.ADDCOMMENTS
, MAX(HD.CONTROL_PROCESS_YN) AS CONTROL_PROCESS_YN /*주문통제처리여부*/ , MAX( HD.EXTERNORDERKEY) AS EXTERNORDERKEY , MAX( HD.OR_HDDATE) AS OR_HDDATE , SUM( COALESCE(DT.INDIAMT, 0) + COALESCE(DT.VAT, 0) ) AS TOT_INDIAMT /* 부가세포함 */ , SUM( CASE WHEN WEIGHTUNIT ='G' THEN COALESCE(TOTALWEIGHT, 0) WHEN WEIGHTUNIT ='KG' THEN COALESCE(TOTALWEIGHT, 0) * 1000 WHEN WEIGHTUNIT ='MT' THEN COALESCE(TOTALWEIGHT, 0) * 1000000 ELSE TOTALWEIGHT END ) AS TOTALWEIGHT /* G으로 환산 */ , SUM(CASE WHEN VOLUMEUNIT = 'MM' THEN COALESCE(VOLUME, 0) /*총부피*/ WHEN VOLUMEUNIT = 'ML' THEN COALESCE(VOLUME, 0) * 1000 WHEN VOLUMEUNIT = 'M3' THEN COALESCE(VOLUME, 0) * 1000000000 ELSE VOLUME END ) AS TOTALVOLUME , SUM(DT.EXQTY /*환산수량(EA)*/) AS TOT_CONVERTQTY , MAX( HD.CTKEY) CTKEY , MAX( HD.LOGGRPCD) LOGGRPCD , MAX( HD.OR_TYPE_CD ) OR_TYPE_CD , MAX( ORTP.TMSOBHDTYPE ) TMSOBHDTYPE , MAX( ORTP.OBHDTYPE ) OBHDTYPE , MAX( HD.ACKEY) ACKEY , MAX( HD.STORE_KEY) STORE_KEY , MAX( HD.TO_CTKEY) TO_CTKEY , MAX( HD.DELIVERY_KEY ) AS DELIVERY_KEY/*납품처코드*/ , MAX( ORTP.TMSOBTYPE) AS TMSOBTYPE , MAX(ORTP.IBYN) IBYN , MAX(ORTP.OBYN) OBYN , MAX(ORTP.WMSYN) WMSYN , MAX(ORTP.TMSYN) TMSYN , MAX( HD.PLANID) PLANID , MAX( HD.REF_DELIVERY_NO) REF_DELIVERY_NO , MAX(HD.COMMENTS) AS COMMENTS , MAX(HD.ADDCOMMENTS) AS ADDCOMMENTS
, #{userid} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력사용자ID*/ , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정사용자ID*/ , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CREATDT FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE ORTP ON HD.OWKEY = ORTP.OWKEY AND HD.OR_TYPE_CD = ORTP.OR_TYPE_CD
INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT DT ON HD.OWKEY = DT.OWKEY AND HD.SOHDKEY = DT.SOHDKEY
INNER JOIN (
SELECT #{item.soHdkey} AS SOHDKEY
) VHD ON HD.SOHDKEY = VHD.SOHDKEY
WHERE HD.OWKEY =#{owkey} AND HD.OR_SEND_YN ='N' /*주문전송여부*/ AND HD.OR_CANCEL_YN ='N' /*주문취소여부*/ AND COALESCE(HD.CONTROL_PROCESS_YN, 'N') ='N' /*통제처리여부*/
AND ORTP.WMSYN = CASE WHEN #{wmsYn} IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE #{wmsYn} END
AND ORTP.TMSYN = CASE WHEN #{tmsYn} IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE #{tmsYn} END
AND ORTP.SOYN ='Y'
GROUP BY HD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , HD.SOHDKEY /*S/O번호*/
mapper.select: /* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml selectSoChk */ SELECT LOWER(SUBSTR(REPLACE(INITCAP(A.SOCOLUMN), '_', ''),1,1))||SUBSTR(REPLACE(INITCAP(A.SOCOLUMN), '_', ''),2) AS SOCOLUMN , COALESCE(B.COMMENTS, A.SOCOLUMN) AS COLNAME , A.ORDERTYPECD AS OR_TYPE_CD , A.HDDTDIV , A.REQRDYN AS ISMANDATORY , A.DEFVAL AS DEFAULT_VALUE , CASE WHEN A.DEFVAL IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DEFAULT_VALUE_YN FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_CHK A LEFT JOIN USER_COL_COMMENTS B ON B.TABLE_NAME = #{tableName} AND A.SOCOLUMN = B.COLUMN_NAME WHERE A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.HDDTDIV = #{hddtdiv} AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND (A.REQRDYN = 'Y' OR A.DEFVAL IS NOT NULL)

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInValidateWbl */ SELECT 1 AS IS_SUCCESS , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , SH.CTKEY , SH.SOHDKEY , INTF.WBLNO , INTF.DLVRYCORPCD FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_RET_WBL INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON INTF.ORGORDERKEY = CH.ORGORDERKEY AND INTF.CLAIMNO = CH.CLAIMNO AND INTF.IFID::TEXT = CH.IFID INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON INTF.ORGORDERKEY = CH.ORGORDERKEY AND INTF.CLAIMNO = CH.CLAIMNO AND CH.COHDKEY = SH.COHDKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{interfaceId}

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml selectInValidateImg */ SELECT 1 AS IS_SUCCESS , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , SH.CTKEY , SH.SOHDKEY , INTF.IMGSEQ , INTF.IMGURL FROM TORDER_INTF_MAL_RET_FILE INTF INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_HD CH ON INTF.ORGORDERKEY = CH.ORGORDERKEY AND INTF.CLAIMNO = CH.CLAIMNO AND INTF.IFID::TEXT = CH.IFID INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON INTF.ORGORDERKEY = CH.ORGORDERKEY AND INTF.CLAIMNO = CH.CLAIMNO AND CH.COHDKEY = SH.COHDKEY WHERE 1 = 1 AND INTF.IFID = #{interfaceId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H SET (WKSTATUS , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN #{successWkstatus} ELSE #{failWkstatus} END AS WKSTATUS , CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN #{successCode} ELSE EL.MESSAGE_CODE END AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(MM.DISPLAYMSG, EL.SERVER_MESSAGE), #{param1}, COALESCE(ML.DISPLAYMSG, EL.PARAM)), #{param0}, COALESCE(ML.DISPLAYMSG, EL.PARAM)) END AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT TC.WKSTATUS , TC.SOHDKEY , TC.DELIVERY_HD_DT , CASE WHEN TC.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'OWKEY' WHEN TC.OR_TYPE_CD IS NULL THEN 'OR_TYPE_CD' WHEN OW.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'OWKEY_M' WHEN OT.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'OR_TYPE_CD_M' ELSE NULL END AS ERRCOL FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TI JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD TC ON TI.EXTERNORDERKEY = TC.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND TI.HD_DT = TC.DELIVERY_HD_DT LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW OW ON TC.OWKEY = OW.OWKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON TC.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND TC.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD ) T LEFT JOIN (
) EL ON T.ERRCOL = EL.SOCOLUMN LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT ML ON EL.PARAM = ML.MULAAPMSGHDKEY AND ML.LAKEY = COALESCE(#{lakey}, 'KOR') LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT MM ON 'MSG_' || EL.MESSAGE_CODE = MM.MULAAPMSGHDKEY AND MM.LAKEY = COALESCE(#{lakey}, 'KOR') WHERE T.SOHDKEY = H.SOHDKEY AND T.DELIVERY_HD_DT = H.DELIVERY_HD_DT ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) INTF WHERE INTF.EXTERNORDERKEY = H.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND INTF.HD_DT = H.DELIVERY_HD_DT )

UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_DT H SET (WKSTATUS , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN #{successWkstatus} ELSE #{failWkstatus} END AS WKSTATUS , CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN #{successCode} ELSE EL.MESSAGE_CODE END AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(MM.DISPLAYMSG, EL.SERVER_MESSAGE), #{param1}, COALESCE(ML.DISPLAYMSG, EL.PARAM)), #{param0}, COALESCE(ML.DISPLAYMSG, EL.PARAM)) END AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT TC.WKSTATUS , TC.SOHDKEY , TC.SODTKEY , TC.DELIVERY_HD_DT , CASE WHEN TC.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'OWKEY' WHEN TC.ICKEY IS NULL THEN 'ICKEY' WHEN OW.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'OWKEY_M' WHEN IC.OWKEY IS NULL THEN 'ICKEY_M' ELSE NULL END AS ERRCOL FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TI JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD TH ON TI.EXTERNORDERKEY = TH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND TI.HD_DT = TH.DELIVERY_HD_DT JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT TC ON TH.OWKEY = TC.OWKEY AND TH.SOHDKEY = TC.SOHDKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW OW ON TC.OWKEY = OW.OWKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON TC.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND TC.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.DELYN = 'N' ) T LEFT JOIN (
) EL ON T.ERRCOL = EL.SOCOLUMN LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT ML ON EL.PARAM = ML.MULAAPMSGHDKEY AND ML.LAKEY = COALESCE(#{lakey}, 'KOR') LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT MM ON 'MSG_' || EL.MESSAGE_CODE = MM.MULAAPMSGHDKEY AND MM.LAKEY = COALESCE(#{lakey}, 'KOR') WHERE T.SOHDKEY = H.SOHDKEY AND T.SODTKEY = H.SODTKEY AND T.DELIVERY_HD_DT = H.DELIVERY_HD_DT ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) INTF WHERE INTF.EXTERNORDERKEY = H.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND INTF.HD_DT = H.DELIVERY_HD_DT )

UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_HD H SET (WKSTATUS , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN #{successWkstatus} ELSE #{failWkstatus} END AS WKSTATUS , CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN #{successCode} ELSE EL.MESSAGE_CODE END AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE REPLACE(EL.SERVER_MESSAGE, #{param1}, EL.PARAM) END AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT TC.WKSTATUS , TC.SOHDKEY , TC.DELIVERY_HD_DT , CASE WHEN TC.OWKEY IS NULL AND CHK.OWKEY > 0 THEN 'OWKEY' WHEN TC.SOHDKEY IS NULL AND CHK.SOHDKEY > 0 THEN 'SOHDKEY' WHEN TC.SO_GR_HDKEY IS NULL AND CHK.SO_GR_HDKEY > 0 THEN 'SO_GR_HDKEY' WHEN TC.SO_GR_DTKEY IS NULL AND CHK.SO_GR_DTKEY > 0 THEN 'SO_GR_DTKEY' WHEN TC.OR_HDDATE IS NULL AND CHK.OR_HDDATE > 0 THEN 'OR_HDDATE' WHEN TC.OR_DATE IS NULL AND CHK.OR_DATE > 0 THEN 'OR_DATE' WHEN TC.OR_TYPE_CD IS NULL AND CHK.OR_TYPE_CD > 0 THEN 'OR_TYPE_CD' WHEN TC.WKSTATUS IS NULL AND CHK.WKSTATUS > 0 THEN 'WKSTATUS' WHEN TC.CTKEY IS NULL AND CHK.CTKEY > 0 THEN 'CTKEY' WHEN TC.DELIVERY_KEY IS NULL AND CHK.DELIVERY_KEY > 0 THEN 'DELIVERY_KEY' WHEN TC.STORE_KEY IS NULL AND CHK.STORE_KEY > 0 THEN 'STORE_KEY' WHEN TC.BILLKEY IS NULL AND CHK.BILLKEY > 0 THEN 'BILLKEY' WHEN TC.PAYERKEY IS NULL AND CHK.PAYERKEY > 0 THEN 'PAYERKEY' WHEN TC.ACKEY IS NULL AND CHK.ACKEY > 0 THEN 'ACKEY' WHEN TC.LOGGRPCD IS NULL AND CHK.LOGGRPCD > 0 THEN 'LOGGRPCD' WHEN TC.EXTERNORDERKEY IS NULL AND CHK.EXTERNORDERKEY > 0 THEN 'EXTERNORDERKEY' WHEN TC.TO_CTKEY IS NULL AND CHK.TO_CTKEY > 0 THEN 'TO_CTKEY' WHEN TC.OR_HDDATE_TO IS NULL AND CHK.OR_HDDATE_TO > 0 THEN 'OR_HDDATE_TO' WHEN TC.ICGRTYPE IS NULL AND CHK.ICGRTYPE > 0 THEN 'ICGRTYPE' WHEN TC.ICGRKEY IS NULL AND CHK.ICGRKEY > 0 THEN 'ICGRKEY' WHEN TC.PO_TYPE IS NULL AND CHK.PO_TYPE > 0 THEN 'PO_TYPE' WHEN TC.REFERENCEKEY IS NULL AND CHK.REFERENCEKEY > 0 THEN 'REFERENCEKEY' WHEN TC.SALESPERSON_ID IS NULL AND CHK.SALESPERSON_ID > 0 THEN 'SALESPERSON_ID' WHEN TC.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID IS NULL AND CHK.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID > 0 THEN 'DELIVERY_PERSON_ID' WHEN TC.EDI_YN IS NULL AND CHK.EDI_YN > 0 THEN 'EDI_YN' WHEN TC.COMMENTS IS NULL AND CHK.COMMENTS > 0 THEN 'COMMENTS' WHEN TC.OR_CANCEL_YN IS NULL AND CHK.OR_CANCEL_YN > 0 THEN 'OR_CANCEL_YN' WHEN TC.OR_CANCEL_DATE IS NULL AND CHK.OR_CANCEL_DATE > 0 THEN 'OR_CANCEL_DATE' WHEN TC.OR_CANCEL_USERID IS NULL AND CHK.OR_CANCEL_USERID > 0 THEN 'OR_CANCEL_USERID' WHEN TC.OR_SEND_YN IS NULL AND CHK.OR_SEND_YN > 0 THEN 'OR_SEND_YN' WHEN TC.OR_SEND_DATE IS NULL AND CHK.OR_SEND_DATE > 0 THEN 'OR_SEND_DATE' WHEN TC.OR_SEND_USERID IS NULL AND CHK.OR_SEND_USERID > 0 THEN 'OR_SEND_USERID' WHEN TC.DELIVERY_ADDRID IS NULL AND CHK.DELIVERY_ADDRID > 0 THEN 'DELIVERY_ADDRID' WHEN TC.CUSTOMERORDERKEY IS NULL AND CHK.CUSTOMERORDERKEY > 0 THEN 'CUSTOMERORDERKEY' WHEN TC.ORDER_ERROR_CD IS NULL AND CHK.ORDER_ERROR_CD > 0 THEN 'ORDER_ERROR_CD' WHEN TC.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS IS NULL AND CHK.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS > 0 THEN 'ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS' WHEN CHK.DELIVERY_KEY > 0 AND DC.ACKEY IS NULL THEN 'DELIVERY_KEY_M' WHEN CHK.STORE_KEY > 0 AND SC.ACKEY IS NULL THEN 'STORE_KEY_M' WHEN CHK.ACKEY > 0 AND AC.ACKEY IS NULL THEN 'ACKEY_M' ELSE NULL END AS ERRCOL FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TI JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD TC ON TI.EXTERNORDERKEY = TC.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND TI.HD_DT = TC.DELIVERY_HD_DT AND TC.WKSTATUS NOT IN ( #{cancelWkstatus}, #{failWkstatus}) AND TC.OWKEY = #{owkey} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY , OR_TYPE_CD , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='SOHDKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SOHDKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='SO_GR_HDKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SO_GR_HDKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='SO_GR_DTKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SO_GR_DTKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_HDDATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_HDDATE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_DATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_DATE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='WKSTATUS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WKSTATUS , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='CTKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CTKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='DELIVERY_KEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DELIVERY_KEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='STORE_KEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS STORE_KEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='BILLKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS BILLKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='PAYERKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PAYERKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ACKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ACKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='LOGGRPCD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LOGGRPCD , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='EXTERNORDERKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EXTERNORDERKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='TO_CTKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TO_CTKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_HDDATE_TO' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_HDDATE_TO , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ICGRTYPE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ICGRTYPE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ICGRKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ICGRKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='PO_TYPE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PO_TYPE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='REFERENCEKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REFERENCEKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='SALESPERSON_ID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SALESPERSON_ID , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='DELIVERY_PERSON_ID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='EDI_YN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EDI_YN , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='COMMENTS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS COMMENTS , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_CANCEL_YN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_CANCEL_YN , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_CANCEL_DATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_CANCEL_DATE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_CANCEL_USERID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_CANCEL_USERID , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_SEND_YN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_SEND_YN , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_SEND_DATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_SEND_DATE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_SEND_USERID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_SEND_USERID , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='DELIVERY_ADDRID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DELIVERY_ADDRID , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='CUSTOMERORDERKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CUSTOMERORDERKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ORDER_ERROR_CD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_CHK WHERE HDDTDIV = #{hddtdiv} AND DELYN = 'N' AND ISMANDATORY = 'Y' GROUP BY OWKEY, OR_TYPE_CD ) CHK ON TC.OWKEY = CHK.OWKEY AND TC.OR_TYPE_CD = CHK.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER DC ON TC.OWKEY = DC.OWKEY AND TC.DELIVERY_KEY = DC.ACKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER SC ON TC.OWKEY = SC.OWKEY AND TC.STORE_KEY = SC.ACKEY LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_CUSTOMER AC ON TC.OWKEY = AC.OWKEY AND TC.ACKEY = AC.ACKEY ) T LEFT JOIN (
) EL ON T.ERRCOL = EL.SOCOLUMN WHERE T.SOHDKEY = H.SOHDKEY AND T.DELIVERY_HD_DT = H.DELIVERY_HD_DT AND H.WKSTATUS NOT IN ( #{cancelWkstatus}, #{failWkstatus}) ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) INTF WHERE INTF.EXTERNORDERKEY = H.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND INTF.HD_DT = H.DELIVERY_HD_DT AND H.WKSTATUS NOT IN ( #{cancelWkstatus}, #{failWkstatus}) AND H.OWKEY = #{owkey} )

UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_DT H SET (WKSTATUS , ORDER_ERROR_CD , ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN #{successWkstatus} ELSE #{failWkstatus} END AS WKSTATUS , CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN #{successCode} ELSE EL.MESSAGE_CODE END AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , CASE WHEN T.ERRCOL IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE REPLACE(EL.SERVER_MESSAGE, #{param1}, EL.PARAM) END AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS , #{interfaceDate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT TC.WKSTATUS , TC.SOHDKEY , TC.SODTKEY , TC.DELIVERY_HD_DT , CASE WHEN TC.OWKEY IS NULL AND CHK.OWKEY > 0 THEN 'OWKEY' WHEN TC.SOHDKEY IS NULL AND CHK.SOHDKEY > 0 THEN 'SOHDKEY' WHEN TC.SODTKEY IS NULL AND CHK.SODTKEY > 0 THEN 'SODTKEY' WHEN TC.ICKEY IS NULL AND CHK.ICKEY > 0 THEN 'ICKEY' WHEN TC.ICUTKEY IS NULL AND CHK.ICUTKEY > 0 THEN 'ICUTKEY' WHEN TC.UOM IS NULL AND CHK.UOM > 0 THEN 'UOM' WHEN TC.INITQTY IS NULL AND CHK.INITQTY > 0 THEN 'INITQTY' WHEN TC.EXQTY IS NULL AND CHK.EXQTY > 0 THEN 'EXQTY' WHEN TC.CFQTY IS NULL AND CHK.CFQTY > 0 THEN 'CFQTY' WHEN TC.SENDQTY IS NULL AND CHK.SENDQTY > 0 THEN 'SENDQTY' WHEN TC.OR_HDDATE IS NULL AND CHK.OR_HDDATE > 0 THEN 'OR_HDDATE' WHEN TC.OR_DATE IS NULL AND CHK.OR_DATE > 0 THEN 'OR_DATE' WHEN TC.SALEUNIT IS NULL AND CHK.SALEUNIT > 0 THEN 'SALEUNIT' WHEN TC.OB_COSTPRICE IS NULL AND CHK.OB_COSTPRICE > 0 THEN 'OB_COSTPRICE' WHEN TC.INDIAMT IS NULL AND CHK.INDIAMT > 0 THEN 'INDIAMT' WHEN TC.VAT IS NULL AND CHK.VAT > 0 THEN 'VAT' WHEN TC.TOTALWEIGHT IS NULL AND CHK.TOTALWEIGHT > 0 THEN 'TOTALWEIGHT' WHEN TC.WEIGHTUNIT IS NULL AND CHK.WEIGHTUNIT > 0 THEN 'WEIGHTUNIT' WHEN TC.VOLUME IS NULL AND CHK.VOLUME > 0 THEN 'VOLUME' WHEN TC.VOLUMEUNIT IS NULL AND CHK.VOLUMEUNIT > 0 THEN 'VOLUMEUNIT' WHEN TC.LOGGRPCD IS NULL AND CHK.LOGGRPCD > 0 THEN 'LOGGRPCD' WHEN TC.COMMENTS IS NULL AND CHK.COMMENTS > 0 THEN 'COMMENTS' WHEN TC.EXTDT IS NULL AND CHK.EXTDT > 0 THEN 'EXTDT' WHEN TC.PRODUCT_LOT IS NULL AND CHK.PRODUCT_LOT > 0 THEN 'PRODUCT_LOT' WHEN TC.PRODUCT_DT IS NULL AND CHK.PRODUCT_DT > 0 THEN 'PRODUCT_DT' WHEN TC.WKSTATUS IS NULL AND CHK.WKSTATUS > 0 THEN 'WKSTATUS' WHEN TC.REFERENCEKEY IS NULL AND CHK.REFERENCEKEY > 0 THEN 'REFERENCEKEY' WHEN TC.REFERENCEDTKEY IS NULL AND CHK.REFERENCEDTKEY > 0 THEN 'REFERENCEDTKEY' WHEN TC.EXTERNORDERKEY IS NULL AND CHK.EXTERNORDERKEY > 0 THEN 'EXTERNORDERKEY' WHEN TC.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY IS NULL AND CHK.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY > 0 THEN 'EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY' WHEN TC.OR_CANCEL_YN IS NULL AND CHK.OR_CANCEL_YN > 0 THEN 'OR_CANCEL_YN' WHEN TC.FAILCOMMENTS IS NULL AND CHK.FAILCOMMENTS > 0 THEN 'FAILCOMMENTS' WHEN TC.RETURNCOMMENTS IS NULL AND CHK.RETURNCOMMENTS > 0 THEN 'RETURNCOMMENTS' WHEN TC.CUSTOMERORDERKEY IS NULL AND CHK.CUSTOMERORDERKEY > 0 THEN 'CUSTOMERORDERKEY' WHEN TC.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY IS NULL AND CHK.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY > 0 THEN 'CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY' WHEN TC.ORDER_ERROR_CD IS NULL AND CHK.ORDER_ERROR_CD > 0 THEN 'ORDER_ERROR_CD' WHEN TC.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS IS NULL AND CHK.ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS > 0 THEN 'ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS' WHEN IC.ICKEY IS NULL THEN 'ICKEY_M' ELSE NULL END AS ERRCOL FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) TI JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD TH ON TI.EXTERNORDERKEY = TH.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND TI.HD_DT = TH.DELIVERY_HD_DT AND TH.WKSTATUS NOT IN ( #{cancelWkstatus}, #{failWkstatus}) AND TH.OWKEY = #{owkey} JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT TC ON TH.OWKEY = TC.OWKEY AND TH.SOHDKEY = TC.SOHDKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY , OR_TYPE_CD , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='SOHDKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SOHDKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='SODTKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SODTKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ICKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ICKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ICUTKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ICUTKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='UOM' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS UOM , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='INITQTY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INITQTY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='EXQTY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EXQTY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='CFQTY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CFQTY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='SENDQTY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SENDQTY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_HDDATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_HDDATE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_DATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_DATE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='SALEUNIT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SALEUNIT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OB_COSTPRICE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OB_COSTPRICE , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='INDIAMT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS INDIAMT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='VAT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS VAT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='TOTALWEIGHT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTALWEIGHT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='WEIGHTUNIT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WEIGHTUNIT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='VOLUME' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS VOLUME , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='VOLUMEUNIT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS VOLUMEUNIT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='LOGGRPCD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LOGGRPCD , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='COMMENTS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS COMMENTS , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='EXTDT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EXTDT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='PRODUCT_LOT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PRODUCT_LOT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='PRODUCT_DT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PRODUCT_DT , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='WKSTATUS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS WKSTATUS , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='REFERENCEKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REFERENCEKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='REFERENCEDTKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REFERENCEDTKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='EXTERNORDERKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EXTERNORDERKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='OR_CANCEL_YN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OR_CANCEL_YN , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='FAILCOMMENTS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FAILCOMMENTS , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='RETURNCOMMENTS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS RETURNCOMMENTS , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='CUSTOMERORDERKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CUSTOMERORDERKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ORDER_ERROR_CD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ORDER_ERROR_CD , SUM(CASE WHEN SOCOLUMN='ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ORDER_ERROR_COMMENTS FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_CHK WHERE HDDTDIV = #{hddtdiv} AND DELYN = 'N' AND ISMANDATORY = 'Y' GROUP BY OWKEY, OR_TYPE_CD ) CHK ON TC.OWKEY = CHK.OWKEY AND TH.OR_TYPE_CD = CHK.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_IC IC ON TC.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND TC.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND IC.DELYN = 'N' ) T LEFT JOIN (
) EL ON T.ERRCOL = EL.SOCOLUMN WHERE T.SOHDKEY = H.SOHDKEY AND T.SODTKEY = H.SODTKEY AND T.DELIVERY_HD_DT = H.DELIVERY_HD_DT AND H.WKSTATUS NOT IN ( #{cancelWkstatus}, #{failWkstatus}) ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_IB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} UNION ALL SELECT EXTERNORDERKEY, OR_HD_DT AS HD_DT FROM TORDER_INTF_OB_HD WHERE INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} ) INTF WHERE INTF.EXTERNORDERKEY = H.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND INTF.HD_DT = H.DELIVERY_HD_DT AND H.WKSTATUS NOT IN ( #{cancelWkstatus}, #{failWkstatus}) AND H.OWKEY = #{owkey} )
mapper.select: /* oms-order-socommon-sql-oracle.xml - selectSoUploadValid */ SELECT T.UPLOADKEY , T.UPLOADSEQ , T.ERRCD AS ORDERERRCD , M.DISPLAYMSG AS ORDERERRCMT FROM ( SELECT A.UPLOADKEY , A.UPLOADSEQ , CASE WHEN B.ICKEY IS NULL THEN 'TXT_ASRT_Y_NOT_CREATE_ASRTKEY' WHEN B.ASRTYN = 'Y' AND C.ASRTKEY IS NULL THEN 'TXT_ASRT_Y_NOT_CREATE_ASRTKEY' WHEN B.ASRTYN = 'N' AND C.ASRTKEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'TXT_ASRT_N_NOT_INPUT_ASRTKEY' WHEN (SELECT MAX(ACKEY) FROM TORDER_MST_AC AC WHERE AC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ACKEY = AC.ACKEY ) IS NULL THEN 'TXT_ACKEY_NOT_CREATE' WHEN (SELECT MAX(ORDERTYPECD) FROM TORDER_MST_ORTYPE O WHERE O.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ORDERTYPECD = O.ORDERTYPECD ) IS NULL THEN 'ORDERTYPECD_NULL' WHEN (SELECT MAX(I.ICKEY) FROM TORDER_MST_IC I WHERE I.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = I.ICKEY AND A.ACKEY = I.ACKEY ) IS NULL THEN 'TXT_ICKEY_NOT_EXIST_IN_ACKEY' WHEN B.ASRTYN = 'Y' AND (SELECT MAX(T.ASRTKEY) FROM TORDER_MST_ASRT T WHERE T.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.OLNICKEY = T.ASRTKEY AND B.ICKEY = T.ASRTREPKEY ) IS NULL THEN 'TXT_ASRTKEY_NOT_EXIST_IN_ICKEY' WHEN B.ASRTYN = 'N' AND COUNT(A.ICKEY) OVER(PARTITION BY A.ICKEY ORDER BY A.UPLOADSEQ) > 1 THEN 'TXT_ICKEY_DUPLICATE' WHEN B.ASRTYN = 'Y' AND COUNT(A.OLNICKEY) OVER(PARTITION BY A.OLNICKEY ORDER BY A.UPLOADSEQ) > 1 THEN 'TXT_OLNICKEY_DUPLICATE' WHEN REGEXP_INSTR(A.ORDQTY, '[^0-9.]') > 0 THEN 'NO_INT_DATA' END AS ERRCD FROM TORDER_UPLOAD_SO A LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_IC B ON B.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ASRT C ON C.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.OLNICKEY = C.ASRTKEY AND A.ICKEY = C.ASRTREPKEY WHERE A.UPLOADKEY = #{uploadkey} AND A.DELYN = 'N' ) T LEFT JOIN TADMIN_MST_MULAAPMSG_DT M ON T.ERRCD = M.MULAAPMSGHDKEY AND M.LAKEY = 'KOR' WHERE T.ERRCD IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert:
/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml insetInboundEOWms */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IB_HD ( OWKEY /*화주 코드*/ , IBEXPECTDATE /*입고 예정 일자*/ , IBHDDATE /*입고 공통 일자*/ , ACKEY /*거래처 코드*/ , ACNAME /*거래처 명*/ , STORE_KEY /*점포 코드*/ , IBHDTYPE /*입고 공통 유형*/ , CTKEY /*센터 코드*/ , IBHDKEY /*입고 공통 코드*/ , ORHDKEY /*주문 공통 코드*/ , WKSTATUS /*작업 상태*/ , LOGGRPCD /*물류그룹코드(상/저온 구분)*/ , UDF1 /*사용자 정의 필드 1*/ /*주문오더유형*/ , ICGRKEY /*상품 그룹 코드*/ , FR_CTKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부 주문 번호*/ , COMMENTS1 , COMMENTS2 , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEKEY /*수정키*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.OR_HDDATE || '000000' AS OR_HDDATE ,X.OR_HDDATE || '000000' AS OR_HDDATE ,CASE WHEN X.ACKEY IS NULL THEN CT.CTKEY ELSE X.ACKEY END AS ACKEY ,CASE WHEN X.ACKEY IS NULL THEN CT.CTNM ELSE AC.ACNM END AS ACNAME ,X.STORE_KEY ,X.IBHDTYPE ,X.CTKEY ,'IB'||CREATDT || LPAD(nextval('seq_twork_info_ib_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS IBHDKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.WKSTATUS ,X.LOGGRPCD ,X.OR_TYPE_CD ,X.ICGRKEY ,X.TO_CTKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.COMMENTS ,X.ADDCOMMENTS ,#{interfaceDate} ,X.INSERTURKEY ,#{interfaceDate} ,#{interfaceDate} ,X.UPDATEURKEY FROM (
) X LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC AC ON X.OWKEY = AC.OWKEY AND X.ACKEY = AC.ACKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT CT ON X.TO_CTKEY = CT.CTKEY WHERE X.IBYN ='Y' AND X.WMSYN ='Y'

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml insetOutboundEOWms */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_OB_HD ( OBHDKEY , ORHDKEY , OWKEY , OBREQUESTDATE , OBHDDATE , STORE_KEY , OBHDTYPE , CTKEY , WKSTATUS , EXTERNORDERKEY , LOGGRPCD , MODFLAG , OBPRIORITY , PACKAGEORDERKEY , COUNTRYCODE , UDF1 , TO_CTKEY , ICGRKEY , SALESPERSON_ID , DELIVERY_PERSON_ID , TMS_SEND_YN , AMOUNTDISPLAYYN , COMMENTS1 , COMMENTS2 , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT 'OB'||CREATDT || LPAD(nextval('seq_twork_info_ob_hd')::TEXT, 6, '0') AS OBHDKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.OWKEY ,X.OR_HDDATE || '000000' AS OR_HDDATE ,X.OR_DATE || '000000' AS OR_DATE ,X.DELIVERY_KEY AS STORE_KEY ,X.OBHDTYPE ,X.CTKEY ,X.WKSTATUS ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.LOGGRPCD ,'N' AS MODFLAG ,'5' AS OBPRIORITY /*출고 우선 순위*/ ,X.SOHDKEY AS PACKAGEORDERKEY ,'KOR' AS COUNTRYCODE ,X.OR_TYPE_CD ,X.TO_CTKEY ,X.ICGRKEY ,X.SALESPERSON_ID ,X.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID ,X.TMSYN AS TMS_SEND_YN ,X.AMOUNTDISPLAYYN ,X.COMMENTS ,X.ADDCOMMENTS ,#{interfaceDate} ,X.INSERTURKEY ,#{interfaceDate} ,X.UPDATEURKEY FROM (
) X WHERE X.OBYN ='Y' AND X.WMSYN ='Y'

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml insetOutboundEODtWms */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_OB_DT ( OBHDKEY , ORHDKEY , OWKEY , CTKEY , ICKEY , ICUTKEY , INITQTY , EXQTY , UOM , SPEC , SALEPRICE , WKSTATUS , OBDTKEY , ORDTKEY , EXTERNORDERKEY , EXTERNORDERLINENUM , ACKEY , ICGRKEY , ICGRTYPE , LOGGRPCD , IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ , BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , ATTRIBUTE1 , ATTRIBUTE2 , PRODUCTLOT , PRICE , AMOUNT , VAT , ITEMRSNTYPE , ITEMRSNMSG , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY , UPDATEKEY ) SELECT HD.OBHDKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.OWKEY ,X.CTKEY ,X.ICKEY ,X.ICUTKEY ,X.INITQTY ,X.EXQTY ,X.UOM ,X.SPEC ,X.SALEPRICE ,X.WKSTATUS ,X.SODTKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ,X.DELIVERY_KEY ,X.ICGRKEY ,X.ICGRTYPE ,X.LOGGRPCD ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(X.IC_RATE, 0)=0 THEN 1 ELSE X.IC_RATE END AS IC_RATE /*행사상품비율*/ ,COALESCE(X.BONUS_IC_RATE, 0) AS BONUS_IC_RATE /*덤상품비율*/ , '2' AS DC , '1' ,X.PRODUCT_LOT ,X.OB_COSTPRICE AS PRICE ,X.INDIAMT AS AMOUNT ,X.VAT ,X.OR_TYPE_CD ,X.OR_TYPE_NAME ,#{interfaceDate} ,X.INSERTURKEY ,#{interfaceDate} ,X.UPDATEURKEY ,#{interfaceDate} FROM (
) X INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_HD HD ON HD.ORHDKEY = X.SOHDKEY
mapper.select:
/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml selectLpnCntList */ SELECT IBEXPECTDATE , CTKEY , SUM(LPNCNT) AS LPNCNT FROM ( SELECT IBEXPECTDATE , IBHDKEY , CTKEY , COUNT(1) + 10 AS LPNCNT FROM ( SELECT IH.CTKEY , IH.OWKEY , ID.IBHDKEY , COALESCE(IH.IBEXPECTDATE, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD')||'000000') AS IBEXPECTDATE , ID.IBDTKEY , ID.ICKEY , ID.ICUTKEY , ID.EXQTY /*입고예정수량*/ , ICT.ICUTQTY * COALESCE(ICT.LAYERPERPALLERT, 1) * COALESCE(ICT.QUANTYTYPERLAYESRS, 1) AS ICUTQTY /*팔레트 입수수량(EA)*/ FROM (
) SO JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_HD IH ON SO.OWKEY = IH.OWKEY AND SO.CTKEY = IH.CTKEY AND SO.SOHDKEY = IH.ORHDKEY JOIN TWORK_INFO_IB_DT ID ON IH.OWKEY = ID.OWKEY AND IH.CTKEY = ID.CTKEY AND IH.IBHDKEY = ID.IBHDKEY JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT ICU ON ID.ICUTKEY = ICU.ICUTKEY AND ID.OWKEY = ICU.OWKEY AND ID.CTKEY = ICU.CTKEY AND ICU.CLOSDATE >= #{interfaceDate} JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICT ON ICU.OWKEY = ICT.OWKEY AND ICU.CTKEY = ICT.CTKEY AND ICU.ICUTKEY = ICT.ICUTKEY AND ICT.ICUTTYPE = #{boxuom} ORDER BY ID.IBHDKEY, ID.IBDTKEY ) T , (SELECT gs.n AS LV FROM generate_series(1, 1000) AS gs(n)) T2 WHERE T2.LV <= CEIL(T.EXQTY / T.ICUTQTY) GROUP BY IBEXPECTDATE, CTKEY, IBHDKEY ) TT GROUP BY IBEXPECTDATE, CTKEY
/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml selectLpnMapNoInfo */ SELECT TO_NUMBER(COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTR(LPN,8,5)), '0')) AS MAX_LPN_NO FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_LPN WHERE LPN LIKE 'P'||SUBSTR(#{ibexpectdate},3,6)||'%'
mapper.insert: /* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml inserInboundEOLpnWms */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IB_LPN ( CTKEY , OWKEY , LPN , LPNDATE , IBEXPECTDATE , IBHDKEY , IBDTKEY , QTY , LABELUSEYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT T.CTKEY , #{owkey} AS OWKEY , 'P'||SUBSTR(T.IBEXPECTDATE,3,6)||LPAD((#{maxLpnNo}::INTEGER + L.LV)::TEXT, 5, '0') ||MOD((SUBSTR(T.IBEXPECTDATE,3,6)||LPAD((#{maxLpnNo}::INTEGER + L.LV)::TEXT, 5, '0'))::NUMERIC::BIGINT,7) AS LPN , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDD') AS LPNDATE , T.IBEXPECTDATE , NULL AS IBHDKEY , NULL AS IBDTKEY , 0 AS QTY , 'N' AS LABELUSEYN , #{interfaceDate} , 'AUTO' , #{interfaceDate} , 'AUTO' FROM (SELECT #{ibexpectdate} AS IBEXPECTDATE, #{ctkey} AS CTKEY) T JOIN ( SELECT gs.n AS LV FROM generate_series(1, #{lpncnt}::INTEGER) AS gs(n) ) L ON 1=1
mapper.update: /* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsPerformance*/ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE T SET (CFQTY ,UOM , EXPIREDATE ,CLOSEYN ,UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT X.CFQTY , X.UOM,X.EXPIREDATE , X.CLOSEYN ,X.UPDATEDATE , X.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE X WHERE X.OWKEY = T.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = T.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = T.SODTKEY AND X.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND T.SAPSENDYN ='N' AND T.CLOSEYN ='N' AND T.DELYN ='N' ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z WHERE Z.OWKEY = T.OWKEY AND Z.SOHDKEY = T.SOHDKEY AND Z.ICKEY = T.ICKEY AND Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) AND T.SAPSENDYN ='N' AND T.CLOSEYN ='N' AND T.DELYN ='N'
mapper.insert: /* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml insertTmsPerformance*/ INSERT INTO TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE ( OWKEY /*화주코드*/ ,SOHDKEY /*S/O번호*/ ,SODTKEY /*S/O상세번호*/ ,WORKSEQ ,CARRCD /*운송사코드*/ ,TRPSEQNUM /*계획번호*/ ,ICKEY ,VEHICLENUM /*차량번호*/ ,DCKEY /*회차*/ ,EQUIPTYPDESC /*차량종류*/ ,DELIVERY_PERSON_ID ,CFQTY /*확정수량*/ ,UOM /*수량단위*/ ,CLOSEYN /*마감여부*/ ,EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ ,EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /*외부주문상세번호*/ ,SAPSENDYN ,REPROCESSYN ,INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ ,INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ ,UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ ,UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) SELECT XXX.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ ,XXX.SOHDKEY /*S/O번호*/ ,XXX.SODTKEY /*S/O상세번호*/ ,XXX.WORKSEQ ,XXX.CARRCD /*운송사코드*/ ,XXX.TRPSEQNUM /*계획번호*/ ,XXX.ICKEY ,XXX.VEHICLENUM /*차량번호*/ ,XXX.DCKEY /*회차*/ ,XXX.EQUIPTYPDESC /*차량종류*/ ,XXX.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID ,XXX.CFQTY /*확정수량*/ ,XXX.UOM /*수량단위*/ ,XXX.CLOSEYN /*마감여부*/ ,XXX.EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ ,XXX.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /*외부주문상세번호*/ ,'N' AS SAPSENDYN ,XXX.REPROCESSYN ,XXX.INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ ,XXX.INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ ,XXX.UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ ,XXX.UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ ,X.SOHDKEY /*S/O번호*/ ,X.SODTKEY /*S/O상세번호*/ ,X.CARRCD /*운송사코드*/ ,X.TRPSEQNUM /*계획번호*/ ,X.VEHICLENUM /*차량번호*/ ,X.DCKEY /*회차*/ ,X.EQUIPTYPDESC /*차량종류*/ ,X.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID ,X.ICKEY ,X.CFQTY /*확정수량*/ ,X.UOM /*수량단위*/ ,X.CLOSEYN /*마감여부*/ ,X.REPROCESSYN ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY /*외부주문번호*/ ,X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY /*외부주문상세번호*/ , CASE WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IS NULL THEN -10 /* SO주문이 존재하지 않은 경우 */ WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IN ('00' ,'05' ,'20', '40' ) THEN -20 /* 작업 진행 중인 상태 제외함*/ WHEN COALESCE(HD.WKSTATUS, 'ING') IN ( 'SEND' , 'CANCEL' , 'ERROR' , 'RECEIPT') THEN -20 /* 실적이 넘어오면 안되는상황 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN -30 /* PROCESS 오류 마감 이후 재처리가 가능 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN 0 /* 이전 작업이 취소이면 처리 대상임 */ WHEN Z.DELYN IS NULL THEN 0 /* 최초처리 건 */ -- WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND Z.CLOSEYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' THEN Z.WORKSEQ +1 /* 수량 업데이트 건 INSERT에서 처리안함*/ -- WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND Z.CLOSEYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN Z.WORKSEQ +1 /* 수량 업데이트 건 INSERT에서 처리안함*/ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN -40 /* 마감 건 취소 처리후 처리가능 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN -50 /* 마감 중복건 */ ELSE - 999::INTEGER END AS WORKSEQ ,#{sysdate} AS INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ ,#{userid} AS INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ ,#{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ ,#{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ FROM TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE X LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SHD ON X.OWKEY = SHD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = SHD.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = SHD.SODTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT HD ON SHD.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND SHD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = HD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND SHD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = HD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY ,SOHDKEY ,SODTKEY ,CARRCD ,TRPSEQNUM ,MAX(WORKSEQ) AS WORKSEQ ,MAX(CLOSEYN) AS CLOSEYN ,MAX(REPROCESSYN) AS REPROCESSYN ,MAX(SAPSENDYN) AS SAPSENDYN ,MAX(DELYN) AS DELYN FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , A.SOHDKEY /*S/O번호*/ , A.SODTKEY /*S/O상세번호*/ , A.CARRCD , A.TRPSEQNUM , MAX(A.WORKSEQ) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY ,A.SOHDKEY , A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD , A.TRPSEQNUM) WORKSEQ , FIRST_VALUE(A.CLOSEYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD, A.TRPSEQNUM ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS CLOSEYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.REPROCESSYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD, A.TRPSEQNUM ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS REPROCESSYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.SAPSENDYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD, A.TRPSEQNUM ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS SAPSENDYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.DELYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD, A.TRPSEQNUM ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) DELYN FROM TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE A INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.SOHDKEY = B.SOHDKEY AND A.SODTKEY = B.SODTKEY AND A.CARRCD = B.CARRCD AND A.TRPSEQNUM = B.TRPSEQNUM AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) GROUP BY OWKEY , SOHDKEY ,SODTKEY , CARRCD , TRPSEQNUM ) Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY WHERE X.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) XXX WHERE XXX.WORKSEQ > -1
mapper.update: /* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateTmsPerformance*/ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE T SET (VEHICLENUM ,DCKEY, EQUIPTYPDESC,DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, CFQTY ,UOM, CLOSEYN,UPDATEDATE ,UPDATEURKEY ) = ( SELECT X.VEHICLENUM , X.DCKEY, X.EQUIPTYPDESC, X.DELIVERY_PERSON_ID, X.CFQTY ,X.UOM, X.CLOSEYN,X.UPDATEDATE , X.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE X WHERE X.OWKEY = T.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = T.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = T.SODTKEY AND X.CARRCD = T.CARRCD AND X.TRPSEQNUM = T.TRPSEQNUM AND X.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND T.CLOSEYN ='N' AND T.DELYN ='N' ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z WHERE Z.OWKEY = T.OWKEY AND Z.SOHDKEY = T.SOHDKEY AND Z.SODTKEY = T.SODTKEY AND Z.CARRCD = T.CARRCD AND Z.TRPSEQNUM = T.TRPSEQNUM AND Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) AND T.SAPSENDYN ='N' AND T.CLOSEYN ='N' AND T.DELYN ='N'
mapper.select: /* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml selectWmsPerformanceErrList */ SELECT XXX.OWKEY ,XXX.SOHDKEY ,XXX.SODTKEY ,XXX.WORKSEQ ,XXX.MESSAGE FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY , X.SOHDKEY , X.SODTKEY , CASE WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IS NULL THEN -10 /* SO주문이 존재하지 않은 경우 */ WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IN ('00' ,'05' ,'20', '40' ) THEN -20 /* 작업 진행 중인 상태 제외함*/ WHEN COALESCE(HD.WKSTATUS, 'ING') IN ( 'SEND' , 'CANCEL' , 'ERROR' , 'RECEIPT') THEN -20 /* 실적이 넘어오면 안되는상황 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN -30 /* PROCESS 오류 마감 이후 재처리가 가능 */ WHEN OT.COMBINATIONYN='Y' AND TRUNC(X.CFQTY / COALESCE(IU.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0) != X.CFQTY / COALESCE(IU.ICUTQTY, 0) THEN -20 WHEN OT.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NOT NULL AND OT.OWSPCVERIFICATION='MULTIPLE' /* 덤행사 배수 체크*/ AND TRUNC(X.CFQTY / COALESCE(IU.ICUNITQTY, 0) / (SHD.IC_RATE + SHD.BONUS_IC_RATE), 0) != X.CFQTY / COALESCE(IU.ICUTQTY, 0) / (SHD.IC_RATE + SHD.BONUS_IC_RATE) THEN -20 WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN 0 /* 이전 작업이 취소이면 처리 대상임 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' THEN 0 /* 수량 업데이트 건 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN 0 /* 수량 업데이트 건 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN -40 /* 마감 건 취소 처리후 처리가능 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN -50 /* 마감 중복건 */ ELSE - 999::INTEGER END AS WORKSEQ , CASE WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IS NULL THEN 'NOT FOUND ORDER NUMBER' WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IN ('00' ,'05' ,'20' , '40' ) THEN 'Unprocessable status' WHEN COALESCE(HD.WKSTATUS, 'ING') IN ( 'SEND' , 'CANCEL' , 'ERROR' , 'RECEIPT') THEN 'Unprocessable status' WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN 'WMS Process Error' WHEN OT.COMBINATIONYN='Y' AND TRUNC(X.CFQTY / COALESCE(IU.ICUNITQTY, 0), 0) != X.CFQTY / COALESCE(IU.ICUTQTY, 0) THEN 'invalid icutqty' WHEN OT.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NOT NULL AND OT.OWSPCVERIFICATION='MULTIPLE' /* 덤행사 배수 체크*/ AND TRUNC(X.CFQTY / COALESCE(IU.ICUNITQTY, 0) / (SHD.IC_RATE + SHD.BONUS_IC_RATE), 0) != X.CFQTY / COALESCE(IU.ICUNITQTY, 0) / (SHD.IC_RATE + SHD.BONUS_IC_RATE) THEN 'invalid multiple qty' WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN '' WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' THEN '' /* 수량 업데이트 건 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN '' /* 수량 업데이트 건 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN 'WMS Process Error' WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN 'It has been duplicated.' ELSE 'Unknown error' END AS MESSAGE FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE X LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SH ON X.OWKEY = SH.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = SH.SOHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT OWKEY , SOHDKEY , CUSTOMERORDERKEY , MIN(CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY) AS CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY , ICKEY , ICUTKEY , UOM , MIN(IC_RATE) AS IC_RATE , MIN(BONUS_IC_RATE) AS BONUS_IC_RATE , (ARRAY_AGG(WKSTATUS ORDER BY SODTKEY))[array_upper(ARRAY_AGG(WKSTATUS ORDER BY SODTKEY), 1)] AS WKSTATUS FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT ISD WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE WMS WHERE WMS.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND WMS.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND WMS.OWKEY = ISD.OWKEY AND WMS.SOHDKEY = ISD.SOHDKEY ) GROUP BY OWKEY , SOHDKEY , CUSTOMERORDERKEY , ICKEY , ICUTKEY , UOM ) SHD ON X.OWKEY = SHD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = SHD.SOHDKEY AND X.ICKEY = SHD.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ICUTXTYPE IU ON SHD.OWKEY = IU.OWKEY AND SHD.ICUTKEY = IU.ICUNITKEY AND SHD.UOM = IU.ICUNITTYPE LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT HD ON SHD.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND SHD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = HD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND SHD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = HD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE OT ON SH.OWKEY = OT.OWKEY AND SH.OR_TYPE_CD = OT.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY ,SOHDKEY ,SODTKEY ,MAX(WORKSEQ) AS WORKSEQ ,MAX(CLOSEYN) AS CLOSEYN ,MAX(REPROCESSYN) AS REPROCESSYN ,MAX(SAPSENDYN) AS SAPSENDYN ,MAX(DELYN) AS DELYN FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , A.SOHDKEY /*S/O번호*/ , A.SODTKEY /*S/O상세번호*/ , MAX(A.WORKSEQ) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY ,A.SOHDKEY , A.SODTKEY) WORKSEQ , FIRST_VALUE(A.CLOSEYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) CLOSEYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.REPROCESSYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) REPROCESSYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.SAPSENDYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) SAPSENDYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.DELYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) DELYN FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE A INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.SOHDKEY = B.SOHDKEY AND A.SODTKEY = B.SODTKEY AND B.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) GROUP BY OWKEY , SOHDKEY ,SODTKEY ) Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY WHERE X.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) XXX WHERE XXX.WORKSEQ < 0

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml selectTmsPerformanceErrList */ SELECT XXX.OWKEY ,XXX.SOHDKEY ,XXX.SODTKEY ,XXX.TRPSEQNUM ,XXX.WORKSEQ ,XXX.MESSAGE FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY , X.SOHDKEY , X.SODTKEY , X.TRPSEQNUM , CASE WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IS NULL THEN -10 /* SO주문이 존재하지 않은 경우 */ WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IN ('00' ,'05' ,'20', '40' ) THEN -20 /* 작업 진행 중인 상태 제외함*/ WHEN COALESCE(HD.WKSTATUS, 'ING') IN ( 'SEND' , 'CANCEL' , 'ERROR' , 'RECEIPT') THEN -20 /* 실적이 넘어오면 안되는상황 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN -30 /* PROCESS 오류 마감 이후 재처리가 가능 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN 0 /* 이전 작업이 취소이면 처리 대상임 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' THEN 0 /* 수량 업데이트 건 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN 0 /* 수량 업데이트 건 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN -40 /* 마감 건 취소 처리후 처리가능 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN -50 /* 마감 중복건 */ ELSE - 999::INTEGER END AS WORKSEQ
, CASE WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IS NULL THEN 'NOT FOUND ORDER NUMBER' WHEN SHD.WKSTATUS IN ('00' ,'05' ,'20' , '40' ) THEN 'Unprocessable status' WHEN COALESCE(HD.WKSTATUS, 'ING') IN ( 'SEND' , 'CANCEL' , 'ERROR' , 'RECEIPT') THEN 'Unprocessable status' WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN 'TMS Process Error' WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN '' WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='N' THEN '' /* 수량 업데이트 건 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN '' /* 수량 업데이트 건 */ WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND COALESCE(X.REPROCESSYN, 'N') ='Y' THEN 'TMS Process Error' WHEN COALESCE(Z.DELYN, 'N') ='N' AND COALESCE(Z.CLOSEYN, 'N') ='Y' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' THEN 'It has been duplicated.' ELSE 'Unknown error' END AS MESSAGE FROM TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE X LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SHD ON X.OWKEY = SHD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = SHD.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = SHD.SODTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT HD ON SHD.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND SHD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = HD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND SHD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = HD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY ,SOHDKEY ,SODTKEY ,CARRCD ,TRPSEQNUM ,MAX(WORKSEQ) AS WORKSEQ ,MAX(CLOSEYN) AS CLOSEYN ,MAX(REPROCESSYN) AS REPROCESSYN ,MAX(SAPSENDYN) AS SAPSENDYN ,MAX(DELYN) AS DELYN FROM ( SELECT A.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , A.SOHDKEY /*S/O번호*/ , A.SODTKEY /*S/O상세번호*/ , A.CARRCD , A.TRPSEQNUM , MAX(A.WORKSEQ) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY ,A.SOHDKEY , A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD , A.TRPSEQNUM) WORKSEQ , FIRST_VALUE(A.CLOSEYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD, A.TRPSEQNUM ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS CLOSEYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.REPROCESSYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD, A.TRPSEQNUM ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS REPROCESSYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.SAPSENDYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD, A.TRPSEQNUM ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS SAPSENDYN , FIRST_VALUE(A.DELYN) OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OWKEY, A.SOHDKEY, A.SODTKEY, A.CARRCD, A.TRPSEQNUM ORDER BY WORKSEQ DESC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS DELYN FROM TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE A INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.SOHDKEY = B.SOHDKEY AND A.SODTKEY = B.SODTKEY AND A.CARRCD = B.CARRCD AND A.TRPSEQNUM = B.TRPSEQNUM AND B.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) GROUP BY OWKEY , SOHDKEY ,SODTKEY, CARRCD , TRPSEQNUM ) Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY AND X.CARRCD = Z.CARRCD AND X.TRPSEQNUM =Z.TRPSEQNUM WHERE X.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} ) XXX WHERE XXX.WORKSEQ < 0
mapper.update: /* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsSODTPerformance */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_DT M SET (CFQTY,WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT MAX( XX.CFQTY) ,'20' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,X.CFQTY ,X.UOM ,X.ICKEY ,SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='Y' AND SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) = X.CFQTY THEN 0 WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.SODTKEY AND V.DELYN='N' AND V.CLOSEYN ='Y' WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND Z.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND X.SAPSENDYN='N' AND (Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NULL OR Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION!='MULTIPLE') AND Y.COMBINATIONYN = 'N' ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY AND XX.SODTKEY = M.SODTKEY GROUP BY XX.OWKEY , XX.SOHDKEY , XX.SODTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,X.CFQTY ,X.UOM ,SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 WHEN V.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND V.DELYN ='N' AND SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) = X.CFQTY THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.SODTKEY AND V.DELYN='N' WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND Z.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND X.SAPSENDYN='N' AND (Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NULL OR Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION!='MULTIPLE') AND Y.COMBINATIONYN = 'N' ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY AND XX.SODTKEY = M.SODTKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsSOHDPerformance */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_HD M SET (WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT '20' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT XX.OWKEY ,XX.SOHDKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(PROC_CNT) = MAX(TOT_CNT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,CASE WHEN X.WKSTATUS ='20' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT ,SUM(1) OVER ( PARTITION BY X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ) AS TOT_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT X INNER JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY ,SOHDKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE WHERE INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} GROUP BY OWKEY ,SOHDKEY ) Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY ) XX GROUP BY XX.OWKEY ,XX.SOHDKEY ) XXX WHERE XXX.CHK ='Y' AND XXX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XXX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT XX.OWKEY ,XX.SOHDKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(PROC_CNT) = MAX(TOT_CNT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,CASE WHEN X.WKSTATUS ='20' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT ,SUM(1) OVER ( PARTITION BY X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ) AS TOT_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT X INNER JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY ,SOHDKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE WHERE INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} GROUP BY OWKEY ,SOHDKEY ) Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY ) XX GROUP BY XX.OWKEY ,XX.SOHDKEY ) XXX WHERE XXX.CHK ='Y' AND XXX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XXX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsCODTPerformance */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_CO_DT M SET (WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT 'COMPLETE' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ,SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ,X.CFQTY ,X.UOM ,SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='Y' AND SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) = X.CFQTY THEN 0 WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.SODTKEY AND V.DELYN='N' AND V.CLOSEYN ='Y' INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON X.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND Z.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND X.SAPSENDYN='N' AND (Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NULL OR Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION!='MULTIPLE') AND Y.COMBINATIONYN = 'N' ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND XX.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY GROUP BY XX.OWKEY , XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , XX.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ,SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ,X.CFQTY ,X.UOM ,SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='Y' AND SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) = X.CFQTY THEN 0 WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.SODTKEY AND V.DELYN='N' INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON X.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND Z.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND X.SAPSENDYN='N' AND (Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NULL OR Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION!='MULTIPLE') AND Y.COMBINATIONYN = 'N' ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND XX.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsCOHDPerformance */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_CO_HD M SET (WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT 'COMPLETE' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT XX.OWKEY ,XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(PROC_CNT) = MAX(TOT_CNT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ,CASE WHEN X.WKSTATUS ='COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT ,SUM(1) OVER ( PARTITION BY X.OWKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) AS TOT_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD INNER JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY ,SOHDKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE WHERE INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} GROUP BY OWKEY ,SOHDKEY ) Z ON SD.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND SD.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT X ON SD.OWKEY = X.OWKEY AND SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = X.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ) XX GROUP BY XX.OWKEY ,XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) XXX WHERE XXX.CHK ='Y' AND XXX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XXX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT XX.OWKEY ,XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(PROC_CNT) = MAX(TOT_CNT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ,CASE WHEN X.WKSTATUS ='COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT ,SUM(1) OVER ( PARTITION BY X.OWKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) AS TOT_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD INNER JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY ,SOHDKEY FROM TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE WHERE INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} GROUP BY OWKEY ,SOHDKEY ) Z ON SD.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND SD.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT X ON SD.OWKEY = X.OWKEY AND SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = X.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ) XX GROUP BY XX.OWKEY ,XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) XXX WHERE XXX.CHK ='Y' AND XXX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XXX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsSODTPerformanceByItem */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_DT M SET (CFQTY,WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT MAX( XX.CFQTY) ,'20' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,X.CFQTY ,X.UOM ,X.ICKEY ,SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='Y' AND SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) = X.CFQTY THEN 0 WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.ICKEY = Z.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.ICKEY AND V.DELYN='N' AND V.CLOSEYN ='Y' WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND Z.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND X.SAPSENDYN='N' AND (Y.COMBINATIONYN='Y' OR (Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NOT NULL AND Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION='MULTIPLE')) ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY AND XX.SODTKEY = M.SODTKEY GROUP BY XX.OWKEY , XX.SOHDKEY , XX.SODTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,X.CFQTY ,X.UOM ,SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 WHEN V.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND V.DELYN ='N' AND SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) = X.CFQTY THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.ICKEY = Z.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.ICKEY = V.ICKEY AND V.DELYN='N' WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND Z.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND X.SAPSENDYN='N' AND (Y.COMBINATIONYN='Y' OR (Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NOT NULL AND Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION='MULTIPLE')) ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY AND XX.SODTKEY = M.SODTKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateWmsCODTPerformanceByItem */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_CO_DT M SET (WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT 'COMPLETE' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ,SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ,X.CFQTY ,X.UOM ,SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='Y' AND SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) = X.CFQTY THEN 0 WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.ICKEY = Z.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.ICKEY = V.ICKEY AND V.DELYN='N' AND V.CLOSEYN ='Y' INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON X.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND Z.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND X.SAPSENDYN='N' AND (Y.COMBINATIONYN='Y' OR (Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NOT NULL AND Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION='MULTIPLE')) ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND XX.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY GROUP BY XX.OWKEY , XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY , XX.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ,SD.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,SD.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ,X.CFQTY ,X.UOM ,SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='Y' AND SUM( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) = X.CFQTY THEN 0 WHEN Y.TMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_WMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.ICKEY = Z.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.ICKEY = V.ICKEY AND V.DELYN='N' INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_DT SD ON X.OWKEY = SD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = SD.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = SD.SODTKEY WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND Z.REQUESTDT = #{requestDt} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' AND X.SAPSENDYN='N' AND (Y.COMBINATIONYN='Y' OR (Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION IS NOT NULL AND Y.OWSPCVERIFICATION='MULTIPLE')) ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY AND XX.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateTmsSODTPerformance */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_DT M SET (CFQTY,WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT MAX( XX.TMSCFQTY) ,'20' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,V.CFQTY ,V.UOM ,SUM( X.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY X.OWKEY , X.SOHDKEY , X.SODTKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.WMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 WHEN MAX( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) = SUM( X.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY X.OWKEY , X.SOHDKEY , X.SODTKEY) THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.SODTKEY AND V.DELYN='N' AND V.CLOSEYN ='Y' WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY AND XX.SODTKEY = M.SODTKEY GROUP BY XX.OWKEY , XX.SOHDKEY , XX.SODTKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,V.CFQTY ,V.UOM ,SUM( X.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY X.OWKEY , X.SOHDKEY , X.SODTKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.WMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 WHEN MAX( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.SOHDKEY , V.SODTKEY) = SUM( X.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY X.OWKEY , X.SOHDKEY , X.SODTKEY) THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.SODTKEY AND V.DELYN='N' AND V.CLOSEYN ='Y' WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY AND XX.SODTKEY = M.SODTKEY GROUP BY XX.OWKEY , XX.SOHDKEY , XX.SODTKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateTmsSOHDPerformance */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_SO_HD M SET (WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT '20' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT XX.OWKEY ,XX.SOHDKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(PROC_CNT) = MAX(TOT_CNT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,CASE WHEN X.WKSTATUS ='20' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT ,SUM(1) OVER ( PARTITION BY X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ) AS TOT_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT X WHERE X.WKSTATUS IN ('20') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z WHERE X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY AND Z.INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} )
) XX GROUP BY XX.OWKEY ,XX.SOHDKEY ) XXX WHERE XXX.CHK ='Y' AND XXX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XXX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT XX.OWKEY ,XX.SOHDKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(PROC_CNT) = MAX(TOT_CNT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ,X.SODTKEY ,CASE WHEN X.WKSTATUS ='20' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT ,SUM(1) OVER ( PARTITION BY X.OWKEY ,X.SOHDKEY ) AS TOT_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_SO_DT X WHERE X.WKSTATUS IN ('20') AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z WHERE X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY AND Z.INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} ) ) XX GROUP BY XX.OWKEY ,XX.SOHDKEY ) XXX WHERE XXX.CHK ='Y' AND XXX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XXX.SOHDKEY = M.SOHDKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateTmsCODTPerformance */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_CO_DT M SET (WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT '20' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ,V.CFQTY ,V.UOM ,SUM( X.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY X.OWKEY, X.EXTERNORDERKEY , X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.WMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 WHEN MAX( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) = SUM( X.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY X.OWKEY , X.EXTERNORDERKEY , X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.SODTKEY AND V.DELYN='N' AND V.CLOSEYN ='Y' INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT W ON X.OWKEY =W.OWKEY AND X.EXTERNORDERKEY = W.EXTERNORDERKEY AND X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = W.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.EXTERNORDERKEY = M.EXTERNORDERKEY AND XX.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = M.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY GROUP BY XX.OWKEY , XX.EXTERNORDERKEY , XX.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERKEY ,X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY ,V.CFQTY ,V.UOM ,SUM( X.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY X.OWKEY , X.EXTERNORDERKEY , X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) AS TMSCFQTY ,Y.IBYN ,Y.OBYN ,Y.TMSYN ,Y.WMSYN ,V.CLOSEYN ,CASE WHEN Y.WMSPERFORMANCEYN ='N' THEN 0 WHEN MAX( V.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY V.OWKEY , V.EXTERNORDERKEY , V.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) = SUM( X.CFQTY ) OVER (PARTITION BY X.OWKEY , X.EXTERNORDERKEY , X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY) THEN 0 ELSE - 1::INTEGER END AS CHK FROM TORDER_INFO_TMS_PERFORMANCE X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = Z.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = Z.SODTKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD HD ON X.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY =HD.SOHDKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ORTYPE Y ON Y.OWKEY = HD.OWKEY AND Y.OR_TYPE_CD = HD.OR_TYPE_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TORDER_INFO_WMS_PERFORMANCE V ON X.OWKEY = V.OWKEY AND X.SOHDKEY = V.SOHDKEY AND X.SODTKEY = V.SODTKEY AND V.DELYN='N' AND V.CLOSEYN ='Y' INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_CO_DT W ON X.OWKEY =W.OWKEY AND X.EXTERNORDERKEY = W.EXTERNORDERKEY AND X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = W.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID = #{interfaceId} AND X.DELYN ='N' AND X.CLOSEYN ='Y' ) XX WHERE XX.CHK > -1 AND XX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XX.EXTERNORDERKEY = M.EXTERNORDERKEY AND XX.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = M.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY GROUP BY XX.OWKEY , XX.EXTERNORDERKEY , XX.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY )

/* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml updateTmsCOHDPerformance */ UPDATE TORDER_INFO_CO_HD M SET (WKSTATUS, UPDATEDATE, UPDATEURKEY) = ( SELECT 'COMPLETE' AS WKSTATUS , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{userid} AS UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT XX.OWKEY ,XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(PROC_CNT) = MAX(TOT_CNT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ,CASE WHEN X.WKSTATUS ='COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT ,SUM(1) OVER ( PARTITION BY X.OWKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) AS TOT_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_DT X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.EXTERNORDERKEY = Z.EXTERNORDERKEY AND X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = Z.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND X.WKSTATUS IN ('COMPLETE') ) XX GROUP BY XX.OWKEY ,XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) XXX WHERE XXX.CHK ='Y' AND XXX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XXX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT XX.OWKEY ,XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,CASE WHEN SUM(PROC_CNT) = MAX(TOT_CNT) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHK FROM ( SELECT X.OWKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERDTKEY ,CASE WHEN X.WKSTATUS ='COMPLETE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS PROC_CNT ,SUM(1) OVER ( PARTITION BY X.OWKEY ,X.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) AS TOT_CNT FROM TORDER_INFO_CO_DT X INNER JOIN TORDER_INTF_TMS_PERFORMANCE Z ON X.OWKEY = Z.OWKEY AND X.EXTERNORDERKEY = Z.EXTERNORDERKEY AND X.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY = Z.EXTERNORDERDETAILKEY WHERE Z.INTERFACE_ID= #{interfaceId} AND X.WKSTATUS IN ('COMPLETE') ) XX GROUP BY XX.OWKEY ,XX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY ) XXX WHERE XXX.CHK ='Y' AND XXX.OWKEY = M.OWKEY AND XXX.CUSTOMERORDERKEY = M.CUSTOMERORDERKEY )
mapper.select: /* oms-socommon-sql-oracle.xml - selectOrderType */ SELECT MAX(A.IBYN) AS IBYN , MAX(A.OBYN) AS OBYN , MAX(A.ORDERAT) AS ORDERAT , MAX(A.WMSYN) AS WMSYN , MAX(A.WMSIBTYPE) AS WMSIBTYPE , MAX(A.WMSOBTYPE) AS WMSOBTYPE FROM TORDER_MST_ORTYPE A INNER JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.ORDERTYPECD = B.ORDERTYPECD AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND B.SOHDKEY = #{sohdkey}
